attacking_style: Deploys in breakaways on mountain stages as tactical operator rather than personal glory hunter, willing to go early to control KOM points for team leadership.
team_tactics: Functions as climbing domestique inserted into breakaways to manage polka dot jersey competition for team leaders like Evenepoel, prioritizing team objectives over stage results.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages where breakaway control is required; less proven on technical descents where mechanical issues have surfaced under race stress.
vulnerability: Technical descents after hard climbing efforts expose both handling limitations and susceptibility to mechanicals (punctures) when equipment is stressed.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist role focused on polka dot jersey management for protected riders
Tactical domestique work prioritized over personal stage ambitions in Grand Tour context
Mechanical vulnerabilities manifest on technical descents following sustained climbing efforts
form_trajectory: unknown: limited observations show tactical role execution but insufficient data on personal form or results
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 3
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 4
